description:
This endpoint creates or updates a batch of Standard Cost Codes.
See [Using Sync Actions](/documentation/using-sync-actions) for additional information.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description:
The 'default' view only returns id and standard_cost_code_list_id. The 'compact' view also includes
origin_id. The 'extended' view includes the more complete list of attributes shown below. The 'ex...

code.description: Cost code, not including parent prefix

id.description: The ID of the Standard Cost Code

code.description: Standard Cost code, including parent prefixes.

parent_id.description: The ID of the parent Standard Cost Code

origin_id.description: The Third-party ID of Standard Cost Code

origin_data.description: Additional Third-party Metadata of the Standard Cost Code (this is a free-form text field)
